arts.sum: The Premier League continues this weekend and Tom Hill has highlighted our writers' best bets for all eight matches taking place on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Nathan Patterson finally set for Everton comeback after Scotland Euro 2024 injury heartbreak
arts.sum: Patterson has been on the treatment table since picking up a hamstring injury at the end of last season that denied him the opportunity to represent Scotland at Euro 2024

arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. Everton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs

arts.ttl: Agent claims John Textor made Everton transfer decision over Orel Mangala
arts.sum: Prospective Everton owner John Textor stepped in to send Orel Mangala to Goodison Park despite the player agreeing to join Fiorentina, claims his agent

arts.sum: Former Everton striker Louis Saha believes Sean Dyche can turn things around but the players need to do better with pressure growing

arts.ttl: Fresh twist in 777 Partners court battle that impacts Everton takeover talks
arts.sum: 777 Partners have been facing a number of legal cases so far this year, and have launched a suit of their own in Florida

arts.ttl: 0 points from 4 games - Could Everton finally be relegated from the Premier League this season?
arts.sum: After 132 years at their beloved Goodison Park, Everton will have a new home next season. The new 'Everton Stadium' on the Bramley-Moore Dock is set to be the home ground for the Toffees from...

arts.ttl: Former Everton chief executive makes John Textor and Dan Friedkin takeover claim
arts.sum: Former chief executive Keith Wyness believes prospective owners John Textor and Dan Friedkin could be "a good team" together at Everton

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton and Paul Merson repeat same Everton warning in Leicester City prediction
arts.sum: Leicester City will be seeking to bounce back from disappointment last weekend in their upcoming clash with Everton, though pundits are warning their winless opponents are more dangerous than presumed. Heaping the pressure on Everton, he finished by stating: "Another defeat, especially against another side from down the bottom of the table, would not go down well," before locking in a 2-1 win for the away side as his prediction.
